x-enumeration-literals.name: AccountingFee
x-enumeration-literals.description: Fee paid for accounting services rendered.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ADRFee
x-enumeration-literals.description: Charge linked to an ADR (American Depositary Receipt).

x-enumeration-literals.name: AdvisoryFee
x-enumeration-literals.description: Fee paid for advisory services rendered.

x-enumeration-literals.name: AirWayBillFee
x-enumeration-literals.description: Charge is an airway bill fee.

x-enumeration-literals.name: BackEndLoad
x-enumeration-literals.description: Sales charge paid by the investor when redeeming an investment such as an investment fund.

x-enumeration-literals.name: BrokerageFee
x-enumeration-literals.description: Fee paid to a broker for services provided.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ClearanceAndHandlingAtDestination
x-enumeration-literals.description: Charge is for clearance and handling of goods at destination.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ClearanceAndHandlingAtOrigin
x-enumeration-literals.description: Charge is for clearance and handling of goods at origin.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CollectFreight
x-enumeration-literals.description: Charge is for the collection of the freight.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Commission
x-enumeration-literals.description: Fee paid for services provided.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ContingencyDeferredSalesCharge
x-enumeration-literals.description: Deferred sales charge.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CorrespondentBankCharge
x-enumeration-literals.description: In investment funds, the charge of the correspondent bank for transferring money.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CustodyFee
x-enumeration-literals.description: Fee paid to a custodian in respect of custodial services.

x-enumeration-literals.name: DangerousGoodsFee
x-enumeration-literals.description: Charge is for dangerous goods.

x-enumeration-literals.name: DilutionLevy
x-enumeration-literals.description: In investment funds, a charge payable by the investor covering bid-offer spreads and dealing charges for the underlying investments. The dilution levy is paid to the fund for the benefit of other unit holders.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Discount
x-enumeration-literals.description: Charge that has been reduced from the standard initial charge levied by a fund, eg, during a launch period or as negotiated by a funds supermarket / discount broker.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Equalisation
x-enumeration-literals.description: The part of an investor's subscription amount that is held by the fund in order to pay incentive or performance fees at the end of the fiscal year.

x-enumeration-literals.name: FrontEndLoad
x-enumeration-literals.description: Sales charge paid immediately by the investor when subscribing to an investment such as an investment fund.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Initial
x-enumeration-literals.description: Charge paid at the time of the first subscription.

x-enumeration-literals.name: InsurancePremium
x-enumeration-literals.description: Charge is a premium for insurance.

x-enumeration-literals.name: IssuanceCancellationFee
x-enumeration-literals.description: Fee linked to the cancellation of an issuance.

x-enumeration-literals.name: IssuanceFee
x-enumeration-literals.description: Charge linked to the issuance of security.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ManagementFee
x-enumeration-literals.description: Fee paid to an investment manager for services. The fee usually includes fund administration costs and investor relationship management. Typically, the amount paid is a percentage of the assets under management.

x-enumeration-literals.name: MatchingFees
x-enumeration-literals.description: Fee charged for matching and/or confirmation.

x-enumeration-literals.name: MiscellaneousFee
x-enumeration-literals.description: Miscellaneous fee.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Other
x-enumeration-literals.description: Another type of charge.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Packaging
x-enumeration-literals.description: Charge is for packaging of goods.

x-enumeration-literals.name: PartAcquis
x-enumeration-literals.description: Portion of charge that the fund is entitled to receive, that cannot be reduced by an intermediary.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Penalty
x-enumeration-literals.description: Fee charged to the investor for early redemption of the fund.

x-enumeration-literals.name: PickUp
x-enumeration-literals.description: Charge is for pick-up of goods.

x-enumeration-literals.name: PostageCharge
x-enumeration-literals.description: Charge paid for the postage.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Premium
x-enumeration-literals.description: In investment funds, pre-arranged addition to the trade amount based on the published net asset value.

x-enumeration-literals.name: PublicationFee
x-enumeration-literals.description: Fee paid in respect of publications made.

x-enumeration-literals.name: RegulatoryFee
x-enumeration-literals.description: Fee charged by a regulatory authority, eg, Securities and Exchange fees.

x-enumeration-literals.name: SecurityCharge
x-enumeration-literals.description: Charge is for security.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ServiceProvisionFee
x-enumeration-literals.description: Fee paid for the provision of financial services.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ShippingCharge
x-enumeration-literals.description: Charge for shipping, including the insurance of securities.

x-enumeration-literals.name: SignatureService
x-enumeration-literals.description: Charge is for signature services.

x-enumeration-literals.name: SpecialConcessions
x-enumeration-literals.description: Charges, drawdown, or other reduction from or in addition to the deal price.

x-enumeration-literals.name: SpeciallyAgreedFrontEndLoad
x-enumeration-literals.description: Specially agreed front-end load.

x-enumeration-literals.name: StorageAtDestination
x-enumeration-literals.description: Charge is for storage of goods at destination.

x-enumeration-literals.name: StorageAtOrigin
x-enumeration-literals.description: Charge is for storage of goods at origin.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Switch
x-enumeration-literals.description: In investment funds, charge related to a switch transaction.

x-enumeration-literals.name: TransferFee
x-enumeration-literals.description: In investment funds, a fee charged for the transfer of ownership of an investment fund.

x-enumeration-literals.name: TransportCharges
x-enumeration-literals.description: Charge is for transport.

x-enumeration-literals.name: UCITSCommission
x-enumeration-literals.description: Charges paid by the investor to the Fund Company for subscription and redemption orders.
